title: SKU Skill
description: Canonical, model-agnostic definition of a SKU.io e-commerce agent skill. The build tool renders this into Claude, OpenAI, and Gemini formats.

name.description: Unique kebab-case identifier. Must match the containing folder name.

domain.description: Business domain. Mirrors SKU.io PAT scope resources (plus 'platform' for auth/meta skills).

version.description: Semver. Bump on any behavioural change.

description.description: Model-facing 'when to use this' summary. This becomes the Claude SKILL.md description and the OpenAI/Gemini tool description, so write it for an agent deciding whether to invoke the skill.

tagline.description: Short, human-facing one-liner ('what it does') for the root README index table. Punchy, not a full sentence. If omitted, the build falls back to the first sentence of `description`.

maintainers.description: GitHub handles of people/agents responsible for the skill.

pages.description: App route patterns where this skill is contextually relevant. The SKU.io web app matches the active page's path against these to surface the skill's action (the contextual skill icon on a page). Each entry begins with '/', is written WITHOUT the app's '/v2' base prefix, and is matched segment-by-segment: a bare path is a prefix match (it also matches pages nested under it), '*' matches any single segment, and a trailing '$' requires an exact segment-count match (no deeper nesting). Example: '/settings/pdf-templates' covers the list page and every template editor under it; '/products$' matches only the products list, not detail pages. Optional — omit for skills with no natural home page.

type.description: SKU.io uses Personal Access Tokens as Bearer tokens.

scopes.description: Required PAT scopes in '{resource}:{read|write}' form, e.g. 'products:read', 'orders:write'.

id.description: Unique-within-skill kebab-case id. Becomes the OpenAI/Gemini tool function name (snake_cased).

path.description: Path relative to base_url, e.g. '/api/products/search'. Path params in {braces}.
